mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.AdminNoticeMapper.selectAdminNoticeList */ SELECT TITLE , CONTENT , DISPLAY_DT , DISPLAY_YN , FIXED_YN , VIEW_COUNT , USE_YN , REGISTER_SEQ , REGISTER_IP , REGISTRATION_DT , UPDATER_SEQ , UPDATER_IP , UPDATE_DT FROM NOTICE

/* com.matjzing.mapper.AdminNoticeMapper.selectAdminNoticePage */ SELECT NOTICE_SEQ , TITLE , CONTENT , DISPLAY_DT , DISPLAY_YN , FIXED_YN , VIEW_COUNT , USE_YN , REGISTER_SEQ , REGISTER_IP , REGISTRATION_DT , UPDATER_SEQ , UPDATER_IP , UPDATE_DT FROM NOTICE

/* com.matjzing.mapper.AdminNoticeMapper.selectAdminNotice */ SELECT NOTICE_SEQ , TITLE , CONTENT , DISPLAY_DT , DISPLAY_YN , FIXED_YN , VIEW_COUNT , USE_YN , REGISTER_SEQ , REGISTER_IP , REGISTRATION_DT , UPDATER_SEQ , UPDATER_IP , UPDATE_DT FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_SEQ = #{noticeSeq}
